title: Super Mario Bros. 3 Corruption Styles 3
description: Back to corrupting Super Mario Bros. 3 with game genie codes! Which I haven't done so for like a month already. But yeah, it's good to be back on corrupting Super Mario games. Anyways, there are 5 glitchy, colorful, and jerky corruptions for you to watch, all which look dreadfully messed up that's for sure. Yes, I know you guys are probably going to say that Mario has been taking so much drugs by the looks of the graphics and whatnot lol, but that's okay. I find some of the strange and funny parts that makes me want to go "wtf?" and I like how some of the behavior errors end up freezing the game or unexpectedly leading to a life lost. But yeah, that's all I have to say. Enjoy.. so I say once more. Some parts got laggy after rendering the video for some reason..
